targets.rawSql:
SELECT
data ->> 'Name' as playername,
data ->> 'Online' as online,
data ->> 'Dead' as dead,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC/100 as x,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC/100 as y,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'z')::NUMERIC/100 as z,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'rotation')::NUMERIC as rotation,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC + 375000) * 0.0000001015) as longitude,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC + 375000) * -0.0000001172) as latitude
from cache where metric = 'player'
and data ->> 'Online' = 'true'
and data ->> 'Dead' = 'false'
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'

SELECT
data ->> 'Name' as playername,
data ->> 'Online' as online,
data ->> 'Dead' as dead,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC/100 as x,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC/100 as y,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'z')::NUMERIC/100 as z,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC + 375000) * 0.0000001015) as longitude,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC + 375000) * -0.0000001172) as latitude
from cache where metric = 'player'
and data ->> 'Online' = 'true'
and data ->> 'Dead' = 'true'
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'

SELECT
data ->> 'Name' as playername,
data ->> 'Online' as online,
data ->> 'Dead' as dead,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC/100 as x,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC/100 as y,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'z')::NUMERIC/100 as z,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC + 375000) * 0.0000001015) as longitude,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC + 375000) * -0.0000001172) as latitude
from cache where metric = 'player'
and data ->> 'Online' = 'false'
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'

panels.description: Map of where circuit $circuit is operating

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
data ->> 'Name' as building,
data ->'PowerInfo' ->> 'CircuitGroupID' as circuit,
data ->> 'Recipe' as recipe,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC/100 as x,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC/100 as y,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'z')::NUMERIC/100 as z,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC + 375000) * 0.0000001015) as longitude,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC + 375000) * -0.0000001172) as latitude
from cache where metric in ('factory', 'extractor')
and (data -> 'PowerInfo' ->> 'CircuitGroupID')::numeric = $circuit
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'

panels.title: Circuit $circuit map

panels.description: number of buildings on each circuit

targets.rawSql:
select 
data -> 'PowerInfo' ->> 'CircuitGroupID' as circuit,
count(*) as building_count
from cache where metric in ('factory', 'extractor')
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'
group by circuit
order by building_count

panels.title: Circuit and building counts

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(prod.name, cons.name) as name,
  COALESCE(prod.rate, 0) - COALESCE(cons.rate, 0) as rate
from
  (
    SELECT
      t.name,
      sum(t.val) as rate
    from
      (
        SELECT
          jsonb_path_query(data, '$.ingredients[*]') ->> 'Name' as name,
          (
            (jsonb_path_query(data, '$.ingredients[*]') ->> 'CurrentConsumed') :: NUMERIC
          ) as val
        FROM
          cache
        where
          metric in ('factory', 'extractor')
          and url = '$server'
          and session_name = '$session'
      ) as t
    group by
      t.name
    order by
      t.name
  ) as cons full
  outer join (
    SELECT
      t.name,
      sum(t.val) as rate
    from
      (
        SELECT
          jsonb_path_query(data, '$.production[*]') ->> 'Name' as name,
          (jsonb_path_query(data, '$.production[*]') ->> 'CurrentProd') :: NUMERIC as val
        FROM
          cache
        where
          metric in ('factory', 'extractor')
          and url = '$server'
          and session_name = '$session'
      ) as t
    group by
      t.name
    order by
      t.name
  ) as prod on cons.name = prod.name
where
  COALESCE(prod.rate, 0) - COALESCE(cons.rate, 0) != 0
order by
  rate desc,
  name

SELECT
  COALESCE(prod.name, cons.name) as name,
  COALESCE(prod.rate, 0) - COALESCE(cons.rate, 0) as rate
from
  (
    SELECT
      t.name,
      sum(t.val) as rate
    from
      (
        SELECT
          jsonb_path_query(data, '$.ingredients[*]') ->> 'Name' as name,
          (
            (jsonb_path_query(data, '$.ingredients[*]') ->> 'MaxConsumed') :: NUMERIC
          ) val
        FROM
          cache
        where
          metric in('factory', 'extractor')
          and url = '$server'
          and session_name = '$session'
      ) as t
    group by
      t.name
    order by
      t.name
  ) as cons full
  outer join (
    SELECT
      t.name,
      sum(t.val) as rate
    from
      (
        SELECT
          jsonb_path_query(data, '$.production[*]') ->> 'Name' as name,
          (jsonb_path_query(data, '$.production[*]') ->> 'MaxProd') :: NUMERIC val
        FROM
          cache
        where
          metric in ('factory', 'extractor')
          and url = '$server'
          and session_name = '$session'
      ) as t
    group by
      t.name
    order by
      t.name
  ) as prod on cons.name = prod.name
where
  COALESCE(prod.rate, 0) - COALESCE(cons.rate, 0) != 0
order by
  rate desc,
  name

select t.name,
t.inventory,
t.x,
t.y,
t.z,
t.longitude,
t.latitude
from (
select 
data ->> 'Name' as name,
data -> 'Inventory' as inventory,
item ->> 'Name' as item,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC/100 as x,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC/100 as y,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'z')::NUMERIC/100 as z,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC + 375000) * 0.0000001015) as longitude,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC + 375000) * -0.0000001172) as latitude
from cache
cross join jsonb_path_query(data, '$.Inventory[*]') as item where metric = 'storageInv'
and item->>'Name' = some(array[$item_storage]::text[])
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'
) as t
group by 
t.name,
t.inventory,
t.x,
t.y,
t.z,
t.longitude,
t.latitude
;

select 
data ->> 'Name' as name,
(data ->> 'Amount')::NUMERIC as count
from cache where metric = 'cloudInv'
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session';

select 
data ->> 'Name' as name,
(data ->> 'Amount')::NUMERIC as count
from cache where metric = 'worldInv'
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session';

select 
(data -> 'RequiredItem' ->> 'Name') as repair_item,
(data -> 'RequiredItem' ->> 'Amount') as repair_item_amount,
(data ->> 'RequiredPower') as power_required,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC/100 as x,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC/100 as y,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'z')::NUMERIC/100 as z
from cache where metric = 'dropPod'
and data ->> 'Looted' != 'true'
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'
order by x, y;

select 
data ->> 'Looted' as looted,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC/100 as x,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC/100 as y,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'z')::NUMERIC/100 as z,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC + 375000) * 0.0000001015) as longitude,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC + 375000) * -0.0000001172) as latitude,
(data -> 'RequiredItem' ->> 'Name') as repair_item,
(data -> 'RequiredItem' ->> 'Amount') as repair_item_amount,
(data ->> 'RequiredPower') as power_required
from cache where metric = 'dropPod'
and data ->> 'Looted' != 'true'
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session';

select 
data ->> 'Looted' as looted,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC/100 as x,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC/100 as y,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'z')::NUMERIC/100 as z,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC + 375000) * 0.0000001015) as longitude,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC + 375000) * -0.0000001172) as latitude,
(data -> 'RequiredItem' ->> 'Name') as repair_item,
(data -> 'RequiredItem' ->> 'Amount') as repair_item_amount,
(data ->> 'RequiredPower') as power_required
from cache where metric = 'dropPod'
and data ->> 'Looted' = 'true'
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session';

select
concat(data->>'ID',':',data->>'VehicleType') as vehicle,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC/100 as x,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC/100 as y,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'z')::NUMERIC/100 as z,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'rotation')::NUMERIC as rotation,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC + 375000) * 0.0000001015) as longitude,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC + 375000) * -0.0000001172) as latitude
from cache where metric = 'truck'
and data ->> 'ID' = '$vehicle'
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session';

select
(data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC/100 as x,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC/100 as y,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'z')::NUMERIC/100 as z,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'rotation') as rotation,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC + 375000) * 0.0000001015) as longitude,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC + 375000) * -0.0000001172) as latitude
from cache_with_history where metric = 'truck'
and data ->> 'ID' = '$vehicle'
and $__timeFilter(time)
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'
order by time desc
limit 100;

select
data,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC/100 as x,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC/100 as y,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'z')::NUMERIC/100 as z,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'rotation')::NUMERIC as rotation,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC + 375000) * 0.0000001015) as longitude,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC + 375000) * -0.0000001172) as latitude
from cache where metric = 'truckStation'
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'
limit 100;

select
concat(data->>'ID',':',data->>'VehicleType') as vehicle,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC/100 as x,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC/100 as y,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'z')::NUMERIC/100 as z,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'rotation')::NUMERIC as rotation,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC + 375000) * 0.0000001015) as longitude,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC + 375000) * -0.0000001172) as latitude
from cache where metric = 'truck'
and data ->> 'ID' <> '$vehicle'
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'
order by id desc

SELECT
data->>'ID' as id,
data->>'Name' as type,
data->>'PathName' as path_name,
data->>'Autopilot' as autopilot,
data->>'Status' as status
from cache WHERE metric = 'truck'
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session';

select
(data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC/100 as x,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC/100 as y,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'z')::NUMERIC/100 as z,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'rotation')::NUMERIC as rotation,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC + 375000) * 0.0000001015) as longitude,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC + 375000) * -0.0000001172) as latitude
from cache_with_history where metric = 'train'
and data ->> 'Name' = '$train'
and $__timeFilter(time)
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'
order by time desc
limit 720;

select
data->>'Name' as name,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC/100 as x,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC/100 as y,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'z')::NUMERIC/100 as z,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'rotation')::NUMERIC as rotation,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC + 375000) * 0.0000001015) as longitude,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC + 375000) * -0.0000001172) as latitude
from cache where metric = 'train'
and data ->> 'Name' = '$train'
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'
order by id desc;

select
  data ->> 'Name' as station_name,
  (data -> 'location' ->> 'x') :: NUMERIC / 100 as x,
  (data -> 'location' ->> 'y') :: NUMERIC / 100 as y,
  (data -> 'location' ->> 'z') :: NUMERIC / 100 as z,
  (data -> 'location' ->> 'rotation') :: NUMERIC as rotation,
  (((data -> 'location' ->> 'x') :: NUMERIC + 375000) * 0.0000001015) as longitude,
  (((data -> 'location' ->> 'y') :: NUMERIC + 375000) * -0.0000001172) as latitude
from cache
where metric = 'trainStation'
  and url = '$server'
  and session_name = '$session'
  and (data -> 'Name') <@ (select jsonb_path_query_array(data, '$.TimeTable[*].StationName') from cache c where metric = 'train' and data ->> 'Name' = '$train' and url = '$server' and session_name = '$session' limit 1)

select
data->>'Name' as name,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC/100 as x,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC/100 as y,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'z')::NUMERIC/100 as z,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'rotation')::NUMERIC as rotation,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC + 375000) * 0.0000001015) as longitude,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC + 375000) * -0.0000001172) as latitude
from cache where metric = 'train'
and data ->> 'Name' <> '$train'
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'
order by id desc;

select
  data ->> 'Name' as station_name,
  (data -> 'location' ->> 'x') :: NUMERIC / 100 as x,
  (data -> 'location' ->> 'y') :: NUMERIC / 100 as y,
  (data -> 'location' ->> 'z') :: NUMERIC / 100 as z,
  (data -> 'location' ->> 'rotation') :: NUMERIC as rotation,
  (((data -> 'location' ->> 'x') :: NUMERIC + 375000) * 0.0000001015) as longitude,
  (((data -> 'location' ->> 'y') :: NUMERIC + 375000) * -0.0000001172) as latitude
from cache
where metric = 'trainStation'
  and url = '$server'
  and session_name = '$session'
  and not (data -> 'Name') <@ (select jsonb_path_query_array(data, '$.TimeTable[*].StationName') from cache c where metric = 'train' and data ->> 'Name' = '$train' and url = '$server' and session_name = '$session' limit 1)

select
data->>'TrainStation' as name
from cache where metric = 'train'
and data ->> 'Name' = '$train'
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'
order by id desc;

select
  jsonb_array_elements_text(jsonb_path_query_array(data, '$.TimeTable[*].StationName')) as station
from cache c
where metric = 'train'
  and data ->> 'Name' = '$train'
  and url = '$server'
  and session_name = '$session'

SELECT 
data->>'Name' as name,
data->>'Status' as status,
data->>'TrainStation' as next_station,
string_agg(t.timetable,', ') as timetable
from cache c
join (select id, jsonb_array_elements_text(jsonb_path_query_array(data, '$.TimeTable[*].StationName')) as timetable from cache where metric='train' and url = '$server' and session_name = '$session') as t on t.id = c.id
where metric = 'train'
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'
group by data->>'Name', data->>'Status', data->>'TrainStation';

select
(data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC/100 as x,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC/100 as y,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'z')::NUMERIC/100 as z,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'rotation')::NUMERIC as rotation,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC + 375000) * 0.0000001015) as longitude,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC + 375000) * -0.0000001172) as latitude
from cache_with_history where metric = 'drone'
and data ->> 'ID' = '$drone'
and $__timeFilter(time)
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'
order by time desc
limit 100;

select
data ->> 'HomeStation' as name,
data ->> 'ID' as id,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC/100 as x,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC/100 as y,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'z')::NUMERIC/100 as z,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'rotation')::NUMERIC as rotation,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC + 375000) * 0.0000001015) as longitude,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC + 375000) * -0.0000001172) as latitude
from cache where metric = 'drone'
and data ->> 'ID' = '$drone'
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'
order by id desc;

(select
    data ->> 'Name' as name,
    data ->> 'PairedStation' as paired,
    (data -> 'location' ->> 'x') :: NUMERIC / 100 as x,
    (data -> 'location' ->> 'y') :: NUMERIC / 100 as y,
    (data -> 'location' ->> 'z') :: NUMERIC / 100 as z,
    (data -> 'location' ->> 'rotation') :: NUMERIC as rotation,
    (
      ((data -> 'location' ->> 'x') :: NUMERIC + 375000) * 0.0000001015
    ) as longitude,
    (
      ((data -> 'location' ->> 'y') :: NUMERIC + 375000) * -0.0000001172
    ) as latitude
  from
    cache
  where
    metric = 'droneStation'
    and url = '$server'
    and session_name = '$session'
    and (data -> 'Name' <@
(
  select
    jsonb_build_array(data -> 'Name',
    data -> 'PairedStation')
  from
    cache
    join (
      SELECT
        data ->> 'HomeStation' as home_station
      from
        cache
      where
        metric = 'drone'
        and data ->> 'ID' = '$drone'
        and url = '$server'
        and session_name = '$session'
    ) as drones on drones.home_station = data ->> 'Name'
  where
    metric = 'droneStation'
    and url = '$server'
    and session_name = '$session'
    limit 1
)
)
)

select
data ->> 'HomeStation' as name,
data ->> 'ID' as id,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC/100 as x,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC/100 as y,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'z')::NUMERIC/100 as z,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'rotation')::NUMERIC as rotation,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC + 375000) * 0.0000001015) as longitude,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC + 375000) * -0.0000001172) as latitude
from cache where metric = 'drone'
and data ->> 'ID' <> '$drone'
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'
order by id desc;

(select
    data ->> 'Name' as name,
    data ->> 'PairedStation' as paired,
    (data -> 'location' ->> 'x') :: NUMERIC / 100 as x,
    (data -> 'location' ->> 'y') :: NUMERIC / 100 as y,
    (data -> 'location' ->> 'z') :: NUMERIC / 100 as z,
    (data -> 'location' ->> 'rotation') :: NUMERIC as rotation,
    (
      ((data -> 'location' ->> 'x') :: NUMERIC + 375000) * 0.0000001015
    ) as longitude,
    (
      ((data -> 'location' ->> 'y') :: NUMERIC + 375000) * -0.0000001172
    ) as latitude
  from
    cache
  where
    metric = 'droneStation'
    and url = '$server'
    and session_name = '$session'
    and NOT(data -> 'Name' <@
(
  select
    jsonb_build_array(data -> 'HomeStation',
    data -> 'PairedStation')
  from
    cache
    join (
      SELECT
        data ->> 'HomeStation' as home_station
      from
        cache
      where
        metric = 'drone'
        and data ->> 'ID' = '$drone'
        and url = '$server'
        and session_name = '$session'
    ) as drones on drones.home_station = data ->> 'Name'
  where
    metric = 'droneStation'
    and url = '$server'
    and session_name = '$session'
    limit 1
)
)
)

select data ->> 'Name' as drone_port,
data ->> 'PairedStation' as paired_port,
coalesce(drones.id, '(no drone)') as drone_id
from
cache
left join
(SELECT 
data ->> 'HomeStation' as home_station,
data ->> 'ID' as id,
data ->> 'CurrentFlyingMode' as flying_mode
from cache
where metric = 'drone'
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'
) as drones on drones.home_station = data ->> 'Name'
where metric = 'droneStation'
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'
order by drones.id

options.content:
Calculate input and output by a square region, bounded by variables.

Edit the map displayed and inspect buildings to get approximate x + y coordinates.
Then plugin bounds for x and y. Factory exports (+/min) and imports (-/min) will be updated according to the new area.

x min, x max, y min and y max are ingame coordinates.

panels.description: Approximate map of the factory - useful for plotting factory boundaries

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
data ->> 'Recipe' as recipe,
data ->> 'Name' as building,
data,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC/100 as x,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC/100 as y,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'z')::NUMERIC/100 as z,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC + 375000) * 0.0000001015) as longitude,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC + 375000) * -0.0000001172) as latitude
FROM cache
where metric in ('factory', 'extractor')
and (data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC/100 >= $xmin
and (data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC/100 <= $xmax 
and (data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC/100 >= $ymin
and (data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC/100 <= $ymax
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'

SELECT
  data ->> 'Recipe' as recipe,
  data ->> 'building' as building,
  (data -> 'location' ->> 'x') :: NUMERIC / 100 as x,
  (data -> 'location' ->> 'y') :: NUMERIC / 100 as y,
  (data -> 'location' ->> 'z') :: NUMERIC / 100 as z,
  (
    ((data -> 'location' ->> 'x') :: NUMERIC + 375000) * 0.0000001015
  ) as longitude,
  (
    ((data -> 'location' ->> 'y') :: NUMERIC + 375000) * -0.0000001172
  ) as latitude
FROM
  cache
where
  metric in ('factory', 'extractor')
  and (
    (data -> 'location' ->> 'x') :: NUMERIC / 100 < $xmin
    or (data -> 'location' ->> 'x') :: NUMERIC / 100 > $xmax
    or (data -> 'location' ->> 'y') :: NUMERIC / 100 < $ymin
    or (data -> 'location' ->> 'y') :: NUMERIC / 100 > $ymax
  )
  and url = '$server'
  and session_name = '$session'

(
  select
    id,
    x,
    y,
    ((x * 100 + 375000) * 0.0000001015) as longitude,
    ((y * 100 + 375000) * -0.0000001172) as latitude
  from
    (
      values
(1, $xmin, $ymin),
        (2, $xmax, $ymin),
        (3, $xmax, $ymax),
        (4, $xmin, $ymax),
        (5, $xmin, $ymin)
    ) as coords (id, x, y)
)
order by
  id

panels.title: Factory Map

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
data ->> 'Recipe' as recipe,
data ->> 'Name' as building,
data ->> 'ManuSpeed' as clockspeed,
count(*) as count
FROM cache
where metric in ('factory', 'extractor')
and (data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC/100 >= $xmin
and (data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC/100 <= $xmax 
and (data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC/100 >= $ymin
and (data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC/100 <= $ymax
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'
group by recipe, building, clockspeed

panels.description: Current average production(+) and consumption(-) over the selected time period

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(prod.name, cons.name) as name,
  COALESCE(prod.rate, 0) - COALESCE(cons.rate, 0) as rate
from
  (
    select
      t.name,
      avg(t.rate) as rate
    from
      (
        SELECT
          t.name,
          sum(t.val) as rate
        from
          (
            SELECT
              time,
              jsonb_path_query(data, '$.ingredients[*]') ->> 'Name' as name,
              (
                (
                  jsonb_path_query(data, '$.ingredients[*]') ->> 'CurrentConsumed'
                ) :: NUMERIC
              ) val
            FROM
              cache_with_history
            where
              metric in ('factory', 'extractor')
              AND (data -> 'location' ->> 'x') :: NUMERIC BETWEEN ($xmin * 100)
              and ($xmax * 100)
              AND (data -> 'location' ->> 'y') :: NUMERIC BETWEEN ($ymin * 100)
              and ($ymax * 100)
              and $__timeFilter(time) 
              and url = '$server'
              and session_name = '$session'
          ) as t
        group by
          t.name,
          t.time
        order by
          t.name
      ) as t
    group by
      t.name
  ) as cons full
  outer join (
    select
      t.name,
      avg(t.rate) as rate
    from
      (
        SELECT
          t.name,
          sum(t.val) as rate
        from
          (
            SELECT
              time,
              jsonb_path_query(data, '$.production[*]') ->> 'Name' as name,
              (
                jsonb_path_query(data, '$.production[*]') ->> 'CurrentProd'
              ) :: NUMERIC val
            FROM
              cache_with_history
            where
              metric in ('factory', 'extractor')
              AND (data -> 'location' ->> 'x') :: NUMERIC BETWEEN ($xmin * 100)
              and ($xmax * 100)
              AND (data -> 'location' ->> 'y') :: NUMERIC BETWEEN ($ymin * 100)
              and ($ymax * 100)
              and $__timeFilter(time) 
              and url = '$server'
              and session_name = '$session'
          ) as t
        group by
          t.name,
          t.time
        order by
          t.name
      ) as t
    group by
      t.name
  ) as prod on cons.name = prod.name
where
  COALESCE(prod.rate, 0) - COALESCE(cons.rate, 0) != 0
order by
  rate desc,
  name

panels.title: Current average Production

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(prod.name, cons.name) as name,
  COALESCE(prod.rate, 0) - COALESCE(cons.rate, 0) as rate
from
  (
    SELECT
      t.name,
      sum(t.val) as rate
    from
      (
        SELECT
          jsonb_path_query(data, '$.ingredients[*]') ->> 'Name' as name,
          (
            (jsonb_path_query(data, '$.ingredients[*]') ->> 'MaxConsumed') :: NUMERIC
          ) val
        FROM
          cache
        where
          metric in ('factory', 'extractor')
          AND (data -> 'location' ->> 'x') :: NUMERIC BETWEEN ($xmin * 100)
          and ($xmax * 100)
          AND (data -> 'location' ->> 'y') :: NUMERIC BETWEEN ($ymin * 100)
          and ($ymax * 100)
          and url = '$server'
          and session_name = '$session'
      ) as t
    group by
      t.name
  ) as cons full
  outer join (
    SELECT
      t.name,
      sum(t.val) as rate
    from
      (
        SELECT
          jsonb_path_query(data, '$.production[*]') ->> 'Name' as name,
          (jsonb_path_query(data, '$.production[*]') ->> 'MaxProd') :: NUMERIC val
        FROM
          cache
        where
          metric in ('factory', 'extractor')
          AND (data -> 'location' ->> 'x') :: NUMERIC BETWEEN ($xmin * 100)
          and ($xmax * 100)
          AND (data -> 'location' ->> 'y') :: NUMERIC BETWEEN ($ymin * 100)
          and ($ymax * 100)
          and url = '$server'
          and session_name = '$session'
      ) as t
    group by
      t.name
  ) as prod on cons.name = prod.name
where
  COALESCE(prod.rate, 0) - COALESCE(cons.rate, 0) != 0
order by
  rate desc,
  name

panels.description: Search for buildings by item production name, and filter out for buildings that are underperforming.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
data ->> 'Name' as building,
data ->> 'Recipe' as recipe,
(data -> 'production' -> 0 ->> 'ProdPercent')::NUMERIC as percent,
data,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC/100 as x,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC/100 as y,
(data -> 'location' ->> 'z')::NUMERIC/100 as z,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'x')::NUMERIC + 375000) * 0.0000001015) as longitude,
(((data -> 'location' ->> 'y')::NUMERIC + 375000) * -0.0000001172) as latitude
FROM cache
where metric in ('factory', 'extractor')
and (data -> 'production' -> 0 ->> 'ProdPercent')::NUMERIC <= $percent
and data -> 'production' -> 0 ->> 'Name' in($item_efficiency)
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'

list.definition: SELECT data ->> 'Name' as NAME FROM cache where metric = 'player' and url = '$server' and session_name = '$session';

list.definition:
select
data->>'ID' as __value,
concat(data->>'ID', ' (', data ->> 'Name', ':', data ->> 'PathName',')') as __text
from cache where metric = 'truck'
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'
order by id desc;

list.definition:
select
data ->> 'ID' as __value,
concat(data ->> 'ID', ' : ', data ->> 'HomeStation') as __text
from cache c
where metric = 'drone'
and data ->> 'CurrentFlyingMode' <> 'DFM_None'
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'
order by c.id desc
list.label: Drone ID
list.name: drone

and data ->> 'CurrentFlyingMode' <> 'DFM_None'
and url = '$server'
and session_name = '$session'
order by c.id desc
